title_en: 67. An-Nawawi says in 'al-Majmoo' (2/3) as for that which comes out of the two
content_en: private parts - then it breaks wudoo according to Allaah ta'alas saying: Aw jaa'a ahadukum min al ghaa'it...: or one of you comes from offices of nature...[Soorat-ul-Maa'idah 5:7] along with his (sallallaahu 'alaihi wa sallam) saying There is no wudoo except from a sound or a smell. [sahih and has preceded (sahih ul Jaarni' (7443)]. He adds: So that which comes out of the front or back part of a man or woman breaks the wudoo - whether excretion or urine or wind - or a worm or pus or blood or stones or anything else and there is no difference in that for something which happens normally or rarely. (2) SOUND SLEEP [5] 68. 'Alee ibn Abi Taalib (radhiAllaahu 'anhu) said: Rasoolullah (sallallaahu 'alaihi wa sallam) said The eye is the drawstring for the anus, so he who sleeps then let him make wudoo. [Abu Dawood (no.203), Ibn Maajah (no.477), Ahmad. Declared as sahih by al-Albaanee]. In the hadith is an evidence that sleep does not in itself something that breaks wudoo , however the Purification is broken if it is possible for something to come out from the anus - however if that is restricted, e.g. by sitting flat on the earth, then that is not the case. (3) BECOMING UNCONSCIOUS - OTHER THAN SLEEP That is the 'intellect' going away by any means because of insanirt or fainting or intoxication - as in this condition he does not know whether his wudoo is broken or not. This is the saying of the great majority of scholars. (Sharh sahih Muslim (4/74) and al-Mughnee (1/164)). (4) Touching the Uncovered Private Parts 69. Abu Hurairah (radhiAllaahu 'anhu) said: Rasoolullah (sallallaahu 'alaihi wa sallam) said If one of you touches his penis and there is no veil between him and it nor any cover, then wudoo has become obligatory for him. [al-Haakim (1/138) and others]. (Al-Albaanee says: hadith sahih.) (5) TOUCHING THE PENIS
title_id: Hadis 67-69: Pembatal Wudu: Keluarnya Sesuatu, Tidur, Hilang Akal, Menyentuh Kemaluan
content_id: An-Nawawi berkata dalam Al-Majmu (2/3): Adapun yang keluar dari kedua jalan, maka hal itu membatalkan wudu berdasarkan firman Allah Taala: Aw jaa a ahadukum minal gaitt (atau salah seorang dari kalian datang dari buang air). [Surah Al-Maidah 5:6]. Beserta sabda beliau ﷺ: Tidak ada wudu kecuali dari suara atau bau. [Sahih sebagaimana telah disebutkan (Sahih al-Jami, 7443)]. Beliau menambahkan: Maka apa pun yang keluar dari bagian depan atau belakang seseorang laki-laki atau perempuan membatalkan wudu, baik itu kotoran, air kencing, angin, cacing, nanah, darah, batu, maupun lainnya. Tidak ada perbedaan antara yang terjadi secara biasa atau jarang. (2) TIDUR NYENYAK. Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu anhu) berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Mata adalah penahan anus, maka barangsiapa tidur hendaknya berwudu. [Abu Dawud (no. 203), Ibnu Majah (no. 477), Ahmad. Dinyatakan sahih oleh Al-Albani]. Hadis ini menjadi bukti bahwa tidur sendiri bukan pembatal wudu, tetapi bersuci batal jika mungkin ada sesuatu yang keluar dari anus. Namun jika tertahan, misalnya dengan duduk merapatkan diri ke tanah, maka tidak demikian. (3) HILANG AKAL SELAIN TIDUR. Yaitu hilangnya akal dengan cara apa pun, karena gila, pingsan, atau mabuk, karena dalam kondisi ini ia tidak tahu apakah wudunya batal atau tidak. Ini adalah pendapat mayoritas ulama. [Syarh Sahih Muslim (4/74) dan Al-Mugni (1/164)]. (4) MENYENTUH KEMALUAN YANG TERBUKA. Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu anhu) berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Jika salah seorang dari kalian menyentuh kemaluannya dan tidak ada penghalang maupun penutup antara dia dan kemaluannya, maka wudu menjadi wajib baginya. [Al-Hakim (1/138) dan lainnya. Al-Albani berkata: hadis sahih]. (5) MENYENTUH KEMALUAN.
content_ar: private parts - then it breaks الوضوء وفقاً لـ Allaah ta'alas saying: Aw jaa'a ahadukum min al ghaa'it...: or one of you comes from offices of nature...[Soorat-ul-Maa'idah 5:7] along with his (ﷺ) saying There is no الوضوء except from a sound or a smell. [صحيح and has preceded (صحيح ul Jaarni' (7443)]. He adds: لذا that which comes out of the front or back part of a man or woman breaks the الوضوء - whether excretion or urine or wind - or a worm or pus or blood or stones or anything else and there is no difference in that for something which happens normally or rarely. (2) SOUND SLEEP [5] 68. 'Alee ibn Abi Taalib (رضي الله عنه) said: رسول الله ﷺ (ﷺ) said The eye is the drawstring for the anus, لذا he who sleeps then let him make الوضوء. [أبو داود (no.203), Ibn Maajah (no.477), أحمد. Declared as صحيح by al-Albaanee]. In the الحديث is an evidence that sleep does not in itself something that breaks الوضوء , غير أن the Purification is broken إذا it is possible for something to come out from the anus - غير أن إذا that is restricted, e.g. by sitting flat on the earth, then that is not the case. (3) BECOMING UNCONSCIOUS - OTHER THAN SLEEP That is the 'العقل' going away by any means لأن of insanirt or fainting or intoxication - as in this condition he does not know whether his الوضوء is broken or not. This is the saying of the great majority of العلماء. (Sharh صحيح مسلم (4/74) and al-Mughnee (1/164)). (4) Touching the Uncovered Private Parts 69. أبو هريرة (رضي الله عنه) said: رسول الله ﷺ (ﷺ) said إذا one of you touches his penis and there is no veil between him and it nor any cover, then الوضوء has become obligatory for him. [al-Haakim (1/138) and others]. (Al-Albaanee says: الحديث صحيح.) (5) TOUCHING THE PENIS
